title: Korak 21

challengeFiles.name: main
challengeFiles.contents:
def verify_card_number(card_number):
    sum_of_odd_digits = 0
    card_number_reversed = card_number[::-1]
    odd_digits = card_number_reversed[::2]

    for digit in odd_digits:
        print(digit)
        sum_of_odd_digits += digit
        
def main():
    card_number = '4111-1111-4555-1142'
    card_translation = str.maketrans({'-': '', ' ': ''})
    translated_card_number = card_number.translate(card_translation)

    verify_card_number(translated_card_number)

main()

def verify_card_number(card_number):
    sum_of_odd_digits = 0
    card_number_reversed = card_number[::-1]
    odd_digits = card_number_reversed[::2]

    for digit in odd_digits:
        print(digit)
        sum_of_odd_digits += digit
        
def main():
    card_number = '4111-1111-4555-1142'
    card_translation = str.maketrans({'-': '', ' ': ''})
    translated_card_number = card_number.translate(card_translation)

    verify_card_number(translated_card_number)

main()

tests.text: Trebalo bi da imaš sum_of_odd_digits += int(digit) unutar kruga for.
Trebalo bi da imaš print(sum_of_odd_digits) na kraju funkcije verify_card_number.

description:
Trenutno, vaš skript vraća TypeError jer pokušavate dodati niz slova na pun broj. Možete ovo popraviti promenom vrednosti digit u pun broj pre nego što ga dodate na sum_of_odd_digits, koristeći funkciju unutar int:

my_string = '123'
my_int = int(my_string)

Izmeni vrednost digit u ceo broj pre nego što ga dodaš u sum_of_odd_digits. Zatim, premesti poziv print na kraj funkcije verify_card_number kako bi ispisao vrednost sum_of_odd_digits.
